expectations.text: Checks for meta title and description presence and quality
expectations.evidence: SEO-02 flags title as 11 chars, too short (recommends 50-60). SEO-05 flags missing meta description with line reference and comment noting '7행 주석에도 명시: <!-- BAD: no meta description -->'. Both include fix guides.

expectations.text: Checks Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image)
expectations.evidence: The review does not mention Open Graph tags, og:title, og:description, og:image, or social meta tags anywhere. The SEO items in the guide do not include OG tags, so the skill-guided review omitted them.
SEO-07 explicitly checks for JSON-LD: '<script type="application/ld+json"> 완전히 누락. 8행 주석에도 명시'. Fix guide provides Organization schema JSON-LD example code.
SEO-06 flags: '<link rel="canonical" 태그 누락. 중복 콘텐츠 문제 발생 가능.' Fix guide provides canonical tag example with absolute URL.

expectations.text: References SEO item codes in findings
expectations.evidence: All findings use structured SEO codes (SEO-01 through SEO-11) and WP codes (WP-01 through WP-18) in both the evaluation table and the fix guide sections.
